final:
module png_compression (
    input [3:0] current_pixel,
    input [3:0] previous_pixel,
    output reg [3:0] differenced_value
);
    always @(*) begin
        differenced_value = current_pixel - previous_pixel;
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      differenced_value <= previous_pixel;
    end
  end

endmodule
